title: Lipid screening documentation
specialty: Preventive care / screening / counseling / administrative documentation

investigations.text: Supports clinician-led cardiovascular risk review and documented lifestyle discussion without autonomously generating advice.
investigations.rationale: Supports cardiovascular risk and lifestyle context for lipid screening documentation; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-led cardiovascular risk review and documented lifestyle discussion without autonomously generating advice.

source.title: Cardiovascular disease: risk assessment and reduction, including lipid modification

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.1.1–1.3.12 — cardiovascular risk and lifestyle review

investigations.text: Supports full lipid profile, blood pressure, BMI, diabetes status, renal function, liver transaminases, thyroid context, muscle symptoms, and clinician-led specialist assessment.
investigations.rationale: Supports clinician-entered lipid and baseline-test context for lipid screening documentation; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports full lipid profile, blood pressure, BMI, diabetes status, renal function, liver transaminases, thyroid context, muscle symptoms, and clinician-led specialist assessment.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Age, indication, fasting status, risk factors, test date, lipid components, units, prior values, interpretation, communication and plan remain absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation, certification or disposition is generated for lipid screening documentation.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
